content:
Dedicated in memory of my dog, Hazel, who has congestive heart failure (CHF).
Her project (hazels-chf) is hosted here. You can view it if you’re going through a similar journey with your beloved pet. It has useful data that you might be able to find comfort in.
Hector

hazels-chf # This is the project dedicated to Hazel. On September 27 2025, Hazel experienced an unexpected syncope. She collapsed, and we thought we lost her.
Unknown to us, she had been silently coping with Congestive Heart Failure, and we didn’t recognize the signs.
This project tracks the journey and shares more insight into CHF in dogs since many may not recognize symptoms or know what to expect.
About Hazel # I can’t start this project without sharing a bit of information about her. We all say our dogs are special, and Hazel is no different.
How the project is split # Data overview # Graphs # Costs # Medication # Medication ranking # Timeline #

Projects # I always set aside time to build new things and learn something new, even if it just means solving some new programming problems that I haven’t seen before.
I primarily work in javascript, but I’m studied in c++.
Image Project Description Link hazel-chf CHF tracking + data project https://github.com/hectorbarquero/personal-projects/tree/main/hazel-chf docs-platform-engineering Contains various tools I make for work. https://github.com/hectorbarquero/docs-platform-engineering LSAF Logistics Support Analysis Forge (LSAF) https://github.com/hectorbarquero/personal-projects sundown Indie game inspired by my sister and her cat https://github.com/hectorbarquero/personal-projects
